allow: Bash(# Get full xe driver boot sequence journalctl -k --no-pager -b)
Bash(# Check Proxmox/virtualization context cat /sys/class/dmi/id/product_name ; cat /sys/class/dmi/id/sys_vendor systemd-detect-virt lspci -v)
Bash(# Check linux-firmware version for context dpkg -l linux-firmware)
Bash(# Check OpenCL device visibility \(non-invasive, just reads sysfs/dev nodes\) ls /dev/dri/ ls /sys/bus/pci/devices/0000:01:00.0/)
